stemHtml: What is the purpose of the balance (slip) indicator's indication?

options.a: The angle of bank corresponds to the rate of turn and TAS being flown.
options.b: Rate of turn and angle of the bank are within the specific operational limits.
options.c: Lateral axis is aligned with the relative airflow so that the aircraft is NOT slipping or skidding.
options.d: Rate of turn is equal to the rate stated in the Operational Manual.
